raw_response:
```json
{
  "communicative_function": "The statement is directing a focus towards spiritual growth and alignment with a higher power's will through prayer and meditation.",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "There is a deity or higher power that can be understood individually.",
    "Prayer and meditation are effective means of improving conscious contact with this deity or higher power.",
    "This contact provides guidance and strength to carry out that guidance."
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "The statement is internally coherent if one accepts the premise of a personal understanding of a deity and the efficacy of prayer and meditation as modes of communication and guidance.",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The statement would be useful for individuals who hold a belief in a higher power and are open to the idea that this higher power has a will that can be known and followed. It would also be relevant for those who value spiritual practices like prayer and meditation as tools for personal development.",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "The statement would be misleading for individuals who do not believe in a deity or higher power, or who view prayer and meditation as ineffective to produce real-world changes or personal guidance. It could also mislead someone if they assume that following this advice guarantees specific outcomes or alignments with reality outside the spiritual context."
}
```

parsed_json.communicative_function: The statement is directing a focus towards spiritual growth and alignment with a higher power's will through prayer and meditation.
implicit_claims: There is a deity or higher power that can be understood individually.
Prayer and meditation are effective means of improving conscious contact with this deity or higher power.
This contact provides guidance and strength to carry out that guidance.
parsed_json.coherence_assessment: The statement is internally coherent if one accepts the premise of a personal understanding of a deity and the efficacy of prayer and meditation as modes of communication and guidance.
parsed_json.conditions_for_usefulness: The statement would be useful for individuals who hold a belief in a higher power and are open to the idea that this higher power has a will that can be known and followed. It would also be relevant for those who value spiritual practices like prayer and meditation as tools for personal development.
parsed_json.conditions_for_misleading: The statement would be misleading for individuals who do not believe in a deity or higher power, or who view prayer and meditation as ineffective to produce real-world changes or personal guidance. It could also mislead someone if they assume that following this advice guarantees specific outcomes or alignments with reality outside the spiritual context.
